channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Road Rolling, 12th March
item.description:
Road has rolled tarmac from the heat in Summer. Please can this be repaired.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 6, High Street, Penge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Neighbour hood watch sign knocked down, 12th March
item.description:
After the grass has been cut a neighbour hood watch sign has been knocked off the lamp post. Please can it be reattached?
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 15, Harland Avenue, Longlands, Sidcup, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: A long stretch of roadway crumbling away, 12th March
item.description:
This road surface has been deteriorating for ages and has become extremely hazardous particularly for cyclists and motorcyclists

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Blackwall Tunnel Approach, Greenwich Peninsula, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Grass verges destroyed by buses &. Cars constantly parking on them, 12th March
item.description:
Buses and cars parking on grassed verges. Completely destroyed the verges.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Old Bromley Road, Southend, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 2 very large potholes 1 metre wide each, 12th March
item.description:
These potholes have been here for weeks and are getting worse.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Tunnel Avenue, Greenwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Worsening graffiti, 12th March
item.description:
Was just one - now is several ‘tags’ - needs to be removed to discourage more

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Thessaly Road, Stockwell, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: On council land needs to be removed! 3rd time reporting, 12th March
item.description:
Being used to store drugs! Needs to be removed asap

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Gorefield Place, London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Fly-tip Large - More than a van load

item.title: Footpath dirty from weeks, 12th March
item.description:
A group of people gather here in the evening, they seem to not know how to behave. I cleaned the street personally a week ago but litter keeps accumulating. Never seen anyone from the council cleaning this area, this condition seems stable from weeks

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Lower Clapton Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Broken glass, 12th March
item.description:
Broken glass on pavement, this is here for weeks now. This is busy pavement used for many kids as 3 schools in the area and 2 pre schools.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Nightingale Lane, Widmore, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dead Fox, 12th March
item.description:
Outside school carpark

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Creswell Drive, Eden Park, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumped rubbish on communal balcony, 12th March
item.description:
Constant dumping of recycling and rubbish bags on communal balcony outside bin shute

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 1, East Surrey Grove, Peckham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Black sacks of rubbish and food waste, 12th March
item.description:
Not sure how long this has been here sacks are opening and spilling out. Attracting vermin. Thanks

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Bannockburn Road, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Road works issue again no temp bus stops on whole stretch of road, 12th March
item.description:
I am writing again regarding the ongoing roadworks on Upper North Street and the repeated suspension of local bus stops. The roadworks were recently removed, and now they have been reinstated again. As a result, the entire stretch of Upper North Street has only one operating bus stop(and now this is out of service), which is completely unreasonable for such a long road. This situation is causing serious difficulty for residents, particularly elderly and disabled individuals, who are being forced to walk a significant distance to access public transport. As a care worker who supports individuals with mobility issues, I am seeing firsthand how challenging and impractical this has become. A simple and practical solution would be to install a temporary bus stop near the roadworks area so that residents can still access bus services without having to walk excessive distances. A temporary stop placed before the traffic management area would resolve this issue immediately. I would appreciate it if this matter could be addressed as soon as possible, as the current arrangement is not suitable for the local community.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Upper North Street, Poplar, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Diesel engine idling Lumley St W1K 6TA, 12th March
item.description:
Aggregates delivery vehicle, noise & air pollution, parked by residents' homes for 20 minutes or more with diesel engine running. Waiting to deliver to building site nearby.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Lumley Street, Mayfair, City of Westminster
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumped Matress, 12th March
item.description:
Hiya this matress has been at the top of Sterry Street for days. thank you.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Tabard Street, The Borough, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Box of household waste, 12th March
item.description:
Left here couple of days ago. Thanks

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Hylton Street, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Black sacks left next to bin, 12th March
item.description:
And clear sacks left on the corner junction Brookedene and Hylton roads. Been here most of this week. Thanks.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Hylton Street, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Household furniture dumped at the top of my road including a double mattress and an entire toilet system amongst general rubbish, 12th March
item.description:
At the top of my road at the usual common location known for flytipping which is bullace Row set 7hj as you may know this is a hot spot for flytipping and has been reported several times by myself for over a year now but here is the latest general rubbish that has been dumped amongst household furniture a double mattress and an entire toilet system with cardboard boxes and bags of rubbish also including a plant pot too same location as always next to a row of green bins just outside of a small alley way

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Bullace Row, Camberwell, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Speed bump is breaking up, 12th March
item.description:
Speed bump has 3 pot holes which is unavoidable can easy damage a vehicle and swerving to miss them you can easily hit another vehicle
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Danson Lane, Welling, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Large tree appears dead, 12th March
item.description:
This has been reported and was told it would be looked at. Please provide an update.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Murray Avenue, Widmore, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
